name: PRISM RIG

fg.code: fn render(c : Ctx) -> vec3f { return vec3f(0.0); }

particles.code: ang = atan2(z, x) + dt * (0.6 + bass * 2.0); r = sqrt(x*x + z*z); r = r + (1.6 - r) * dt * 0.5; x = r * cos(ang); z = r * sin(ang); y = y + (beat * 0.9 - y * 0.5) * dt * 6; size = 0.015 + treb * 0.03;

credit: PHOSPHENE built-in: exercises mesh, particles, passes, text, bloom
